description_long: This object is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark metal head and a long, tapered wooden handle. The head has a single, broad cutting edge on one side and a flat poll on the opposite, suitable for striking. The handle is made of light-colored wood, smoothly finished, and slightly tapered for ergonomic grip. The blade is securely mounted through the handle with a traditional wedged fit, visible at the top. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding. This axe is typical for use in urban maintenance, gardening, or emergency scenarios.
description: A hand axe with a dark metal head and a long, tapered wooden handle, designed for cutting and striking tasks.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the broad blade and the wooden handle extending downward.
description_view_1: A side profile highlights the length of the wooden handle and the thickness of the metal head.
description_view_2: The bottom view reveals the end of the handle and the rectangular cross-section of the axe head.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile displays the flat poll and the full length of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, tapered wooden handle with a smooth finish and oval cross-section, designed for ergonomic grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad cutting edge with a flat poll, rectangular cross-section, no beard, and no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fit through the handle eye.
